## Checklist

- [ ] Atomic commits — one logical change per commit
- [ ] `npm run check:all` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No `git add .` used
- [ ] Merge strategy: merge-commit or rebase (NEVER squash)
